content: Create lib/workStore.js — global store for analyze jobs + polish-pending IDs with continuous poller
Create components/WorkProgressFloater.jsx — fixed bottom-right pill, shows analyze + polish progress
Mount the floater in App.jsx so it survives navigation
Wire AddItem.jsx to register analyze jobs + polish items with workStore
Fire 'You have news in your closet' toast when polish batch completes
Add i18n strings + lint + smoke-test by saving multiple items + navigating
